articles.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
articles.content: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
articles.titleZh: 受够了vibe编码器，开发人员将数据核对提示注入到他们的代码中
articles.contentZh: Jqwik中未公开的添加指示AI编码代理删除应用输出。

articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: Analyzing their SSD activity
articles.content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.
articles.titleZh: 网站有一种监视访问者的新方法：分析其SSD活动
articles.contentZh: 可以使用简单的JavaScript在浏览器中测量Telltale SSD活动。

articles.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
articles.content: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.
articles.titleZh: 数以百万计的人工智能代理受到开源软件包中严重漏洞的威胁
articles.contentZh: 在Starlette中找到了“BadHost” ，这是一个每周下载3.25亿次的软件包。

articles.title: US's big bet on quantum computing may not be entirely legal
articles.content: Deal also launched the first quantum foundry company, but is there a need for it?
articles.titleZh: 美国在量子计算上的大赌注可能不完全合法
articles.contentZh: Deal还推出了第一家量子代工公司，但有需要吗？

articles.title: Trump Mobile’s website still says the T1 Phone is ‘American-made’
articles.content: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. As the phone's supposed launch continues, we noticed its website may be violating FTC rules. When the Trump phone was first announced last June, it was proudly promised to be […]
articles.titleZh: 特朗普移动的网站仍然说T1手机是“美国制造的”
articles.contentZh: 特朗普的电话在哪里？我们每周都会继续讨论这个问题。我们一如既往地与您联系，询问特朗普手机的下落。随着手机的推出，我们注意到其网站可能违反了联邦贸易委员会的规定。当特朗普手机于去年6月首次发布时，它自豪地承诺将成为[…]

articles.title: Jony Ive’s funky Ferrari
articles.content: Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce. (If you can, or do… hit us up.) There's still no question that Ferrari's first electric vehicle is one of the most interesting, surprising cars of the year. With a decidedly un-Ferrari look, and lots of new technology and designs courtesy of […]
articles.contentZh: 大多数人永远不会拥有、驾驶甚至坐在法拉利Luce里面。（如果你可以，或者做……打我们。）毫无疑问，法拉利的第一辆电动汽车是今年最有趣、最令人惊讶的汽车之一。具有明显的非法拉利外观，以及许多由[…]提供的新技术和设计
